parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "prompt": "Requirement {{ $node['Parse Request'].json.req_id }}: {{ $node['Parse Request'].json.title }}
Round: {{ $node['Parse Request'].json.round + 1 }}

Task: Implement the feature based on dev.spec.md, then verify in debug environment.

Steps:
1. Write code in worktree based on dev.spec.md
2. Use skill for small orchestration (split files, generate tests, self-check)
3. git push the changes
4. Use aissh MCP to control the debug environment:
   a. git pull the latest code
   b. Setup dependencies (DB, backend, frontend)
   c. Run layered verification:
      - L0: Static check (lint, type check, compile)
      - L1: Unit tests
      - L2: Contract tests (API schema validation)
      - L3: Deploy services + Integration tests
   d. Return results for each layer
5. Report results back

Return JSON: { success: bool, layer_results: { l0: {passed, log}, l1: {passed, log}, l2: {passed, log}, l3: {passed, log} }, tokens_used: number, failed_layer: string|null, error_summary: string|null }",
  "timeout": 1500000
}

={
  "prompt": "You are an independent acceptance tester. You have NO context from the development process.

Requirement: {{ $node['Parse Request'].json.req_id }} - {{ $node['Parse Request'].json.title }}

Task:
1. Read the LOCKED ac.spec.yaml for this requirement
2. Use aissh MCP to setup a clean environment (new or reuse namespace)
3. Deploy the full service stack
4. Execute each Given/When/Then scenario
5. Record evidence (response bodies, status codes, screenshots if UI)
6. Generate acceptance report

Return JSON: { accepted: bool, scenarios_total: number, scenarios_passed: number, report: string, evidence: [] }",
  "timeout": 600000
}

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "status": "success",
  "req_id": "{{ $node['Parse Request'].json.req_id }}",
  "title": "{{ $node['Parse Request'].json.title }}",
  "rounds": {{ $node['Collect Result'].json.round }},
  "total_tokens": {{ $node['Collect Result'].json.total_tokens }},
  "elapsed_ms": {{ $node['Collect Result'].json.elapsed_ms }},
  "message": "Feature implemented, CI passed, acceptance passed. Ready for code review."
}
